en_definition: a task or piece of work given to someone to do
example1: The assignment is due next Monday in class.
example1_ru: Задание нужно сдать в следующий понедельник на занятии.
example2: My professor gave us a long assignment about English grammar.

en_definition: the date or time when something must be finished
example1: The deadline for the essay is Friday at 5 PM.
example1_ru: Крайний срок сдачи сочинения — пятница, 17:00.
example2: Students often miss the deadline for assignment submission.

en_definition: a plan showing the times when events will happen
example1: Check the timetable to see when your class starts.
example1_ru: Посмотрите расписание, чтобы узнать, когда начинается ваше занятие.
example2: My class timetable changes every semester at university.

en_definition: to be present at an event or meeting
example1: I attend class every day at nine o'clock.
example1_ru: Я хожу на занятия каждый день в девять часов.
example2: All students must attend the opening ceremony tomorrow.

en_definition: to make something clear by giving details about it
example1: The teacher explained the difficult grammar point slowly.
example1_ru: Учитель медленно объяснил сложный грамматический момент.
example2: Can you explain what this word means in English?

en_definition: an explanation of what a word or phrase means
example1: Look up the definition of this word in the dictionary.
example1_ru: Посмотрите определение этого слова в словаре.
example2: The teacher gave a clear definition of that difficult term.

en_definition: to put your hand up to ask a question or answer
example1: Raise your hand if you know the answer to this question.
example1_ru: Поднимите руку, если знаете ответ на этот вопрос.
example2: Students must raise a hand before speaking in class.

en_definition: a score or grade given for work or an exam
example1: I got a very good mark on my English test yesterday.
example1_ru: Вчера я получил очень хорошую оценку за тест по английскому.
example2: The mark for this assignment will be posted next week.

en_definition: the action or process of writing your name on an official list
example1: Registration for the new semester starts next Monday morning.
example1_ru: Регистрация на новый семестр начинается в следующий понедельник утром.
example2: Students must complete registration before they can attend classes.

en_definition: a printed paper with spaces for you to write information
example1: Please fill out this form with your personal information.
example1_ru: Пожалуйста, заполните эту форму своими личными данными.
example2: The registration form asks for your name and student number.

en_definition: to give something to someone in authority, especially officially
example1: You must submit your essay before the deadline tomorrow.
example1_ru: Вы должны сдать сочинение до завтрашнего крайнего срока.
example2: Please submit your homework to the teacher by Friday.

en_definition: to ask formally for something, usually a job or place at university
example1: I want to apply for the scholarship this year.
example1_ru: В этом году я хочу подать заявку на стипендию.
example2: When will you apply for graduate school programs?

en_definition: a person who works or studies with you in the same place
example1: My colleagues helped me understand the difficult assignment.
example1_ru: Коллеги помогли мне разобраться со сложным заданием.
example2: I work on group projects with my colleagues at university.

en_definition: a formal meeting where someone asks you questions to see if you are suitable
example1: I have a job interview tomorrow morning at ten o'clock.
example1_ru: Завтра утром в десять часов у меня собеседование на работу.
example2: The interview lasted about one hour and went very well.

en_definition: a topic or area of study at school or university
example1: My favourite subject at university is English literature.
example1_ru: Мой любимый предмет в университете — английская литература.
example2: History is a difficult subject with many dates to remember.

en_definition: a talk given by a teacher to a group of students at university
example1: The lecture on chemistry was very interesting and difficult.
example1_ru: Лекция по химии была очень интересной и сложной.
example2: I attend three lectures every Tuesday morning in the main hall.

en_definition: a test given to check how much you know about something
example1: The final exam is very important for your grade.
example1_ru: Итоговый экзамен очень важен для вашей оценки.
example2: I studied all night to prepare for the difficult exam.

en_definition: one of the two main periods in an academic year at university
example1: Next semester I will take four different subjects.
example1_ru: В следующем семестре у меня будет четыре разных предмета.
example2: The spring semester ends in June at our university.

en_definition: a series of lessons on a particular subject at school or university
example1: I'm taking a course in advanced English grammar next semester.
example1_ru: В следующем семестре я записался на курс продвинутой английской грамматики.
example2: This course teaches practical business communication skills.

en_definition: the main subject you study at university
example1: My major is International Business Studies at university.
example1_ru: Моя специальность в университете — международный бизнес.
example2: What major are you planning to study next year?

en_definition: a teacher at university who has studied a subject deeply
example1: My English professor gives helpful feedback on our writing.
example1_ru: Мой преподаватель английского даёт полезные комментарии к нашим письменным работам.
example2: The professor explained the difficult concept in a clear way.

en_definition: to seek information by speaking to someone
example1: It is good to ask questions if you don't understand something.
example1_ru: Хорошо задавать вопросы, если вы чего-то не понимаете.
example2: Please ask a question after I finish my explanation.

en_definition: to write down information during a lecture or meeting
example1: Always take notes during lectures so you remember the information.
example1_ru: Всегда делайте записи на лекциях, чтобы запомнить информацию.
example2: I take notes on my laptop when the professor is talking.

en_definition: to succeed in an exam or test by getting enough marks
example1: I hope I pass the English exam next week.
example1_ru: Надеюсь, я сдам экзамен по английскому на следующей неделе.
example2: She studied hard and passed all her courses this semester.

en_definition: to not succeed in an exam or test by getting too few marks
example1: I did not study and failed the chemistry exam badly.
example1_ru: Я не занимался и с треском провалил экзамен по химии.
example2: If you fail this course, you must take it again next year.

en_definition: to learn about a subject by reading and thinking about it
example1: I study English for three hours every day at university.
example1_ru: Я занимаюсь английским по три часа каждый день в университете.
example2: We studied hard before the final exam last month.

en_definition: to know or realize the meaning of something
example1: Do you understand this difficult grammar rule?
example1_ru: Ты понимаешь это сложное грамматическое правило?
example2: I finally understand how to solve this type of math problem.

en_definition: to get knowledge or skill in a subject through study
example1: I want to learn how to speak English more fluently.
example1_ru: Я хочу научиться говорить по-английски более бегло.
example2: She learned a lot from that intensive English course.

en_definition: to give lessons to students or help them learn something
example1: My professor teaches advanced grammar every Tuesday morning.
example1_ru: Мой преподаватель ведёт продвинутую грамматику каждый вторник утром.
example2: She teaches international business to over two hundred students.

en_definition: to talk about something with other people to share ideas
example1: We discuss the book in class every Friday afternoon.
example1_ru: Мы обсуждаем книгу на занятии каждую пятницу днём.
example2: Let's discuss the assignment requirements before we start working.

en_definition: to share information or express ideas with other people
example1: It is important to communicate clearly in English at university.
example1_ru: В университете важно чётко общаться на английском.
example2: We communicate with the teacher through email about the project.

en_definition: to show or give information to an audience
example1: I need to present my research project to the whole class.
example1_ru: Мне нужно представить свой исследовательский проект всему классу.
example2: She presented her findings very well at the conference.

en_definition: a talk given by someone to an audience with slides or visuals
example1: My presentation about global business is next Friday afternoon.
example1_ru: Моя презентация о глобальном бизнесе в следующую пятницу днём.
example2: The presentation lasted twenty minutes with questions after.

en_definition: regular work that a person does, usually for money
example1: I need to find a summer job to earn money for university.
example1_ru: Мне нужно найти летнюю подработку, чтобы заработать на учёбу.
example2: My first job was working at a restaurant near campus.

en_definition: a job or place of responsibility in an organization
example1: She applied for a position in the company's marketing department.
example1_ru: Она подала заявку на должность в отделе маркетинга компании.
example2: I want to find a position that uses my English language skills.

en_definition: a person who works for a company or other organization
example1: The company has over five hundred employees in our city.
example1_ru: В компании более пятисот сотрудников в нашем городе.
example2: As a new employee, I received training for two weeks.

en_definition: a person or company that employs people and pays them
example1: My employer gives us free health insurance benefits.
example1_ru: Мой работодатель предоставляет нам бесплатную медицинскую страховку.
example2: Good employers treat their employees with respect and fairness.

en_definition: the money a worker earns and receives regularly for their job
example1: He spends part of his paycheck on rent every month.
example1_ru: Он тратит часть зарплаты на аренду жилья каждый месяц.
example2: Her first paycheck arrived two weeks after she started work.

en_definition: knowledge or skill acquired by doing something for a long time
example1: I need two years of experience for this job position.
example1_ru: Для этой должности мне нужен двухлетний опыт работы.
example2: Working abroad gives you valuable international experience.

en_definition: the ability to do something well, usually developed through practice
example1: Good communication skills are important for any job.
example1_ru: Хорошие коммуникативные навыки важны для любой работы.
example2: I developed my technical skills through this computer course.

en_definition: a short written description of your education and job experience
example1: I need to update my resume before applying for jobs.
example1_ru: Мне нужно обновить резюме перед тем, как откликаться на вакансии.
example2: The employer asked me to email my resume and cover letter.

en_definition: to employ someone and pay them to do a job for you
example1: The company decided to hire five new engineers this month.
example1_ru: В этом месяце компания решила нанять пятерых новых инженеров.
example2: They will hire more people when business improves next year.

en_definition: to use your voice to say words or express ideas
example1: I try to speak English every day to improve my fluency.
example1_ru: Я стараюсь говорить по-английски каждый день, чтобы улучшить беглость речи.
example2: Please speak more slowly because I do not understand you.

en_definition: to hear and pay attention to sounds or what someone says
example1: Listen carefully to the teacher's instructions before you start.
example1_ru: Внимательно слушайте инструкции учителя, прежде чем начать.
example2: I listen to English podcasts every morning while exercising.

en_definition: a talk between two or more people about a topic
example1: I had a good conversation with my classmate about the assignment.
example1_ru: У меня был хороший разговор с однокурсником о задании.
example2: Practice conversations with native speakers to improve English.

en_definition: to talk about and consider different ideas with others
example1: In group work, we discuss ideas before writing our report.
example1_ru: В групповой работе мы обсуждаем идеи перед написанием отчёта.
example2: The class will discuss ideas for the final project tomorrow.

ru_translation: электронная почта, письмо по электронной почте
en_definition: a message sent from one computer to another using the internet
example1: Send me an email with the assignment requirements by tomorrow.
example1_ru: Пришли мне письмо с требованиями к заданию до завтра.
example2: The professor responds to emails within twenty four hours.

en_definition: information sent or given to someone by telephone or in writing
example1: I left a message for you on the bulletin board yesterday.
example1_ru: Вчера я оставил тебе сообщение на доске объявлений.
example2: Send me a message if you need help with the homework.

en_definition: to make something clear or easier to understand
example1: Can you clarify what the homework assignment is exactly?
example1_ru: Можешь уточнить, в чём именно заключается домашнее задание?
example2: The teacher clarified the instructions for the group project.

en_definition: to state or verify that something is true or correct
example1: Please confirm that you received my email about the meeting.
example1_ru: Пожалуйста, подтвердите, что вы получили моё письмо о встрече.
example2: The teacher confirmed the exam date for next month.

en_definition: to request that someone help you do something
example1: Do not hesitate to ask for help if you struggle.
example1_ru: Не стесняйтесь просить о помощи, если у вас трудности.
example2: I asked my classmates for help understanding the difficult topic.

en_definition: to tell someone that you will help them do something
example1: My colleague offered help with my final project last week.
example1_ru: На прошлой неделе коллега предложил помощь с моим итоговым проектом.
example2: The teacher offered help to students who were struggling.

en_definition: to show or tell someone something that they have not noticed
example1: She pointed out an error in my homework before I submitted it.
example1_ru: Прежде чем я сдал домашнюю работу, она указала мне на ошибку.
example2: The teacher pointed out that we need to cite our sources.

en_definition: to present an idea or suggestion for consideration
example1: I put forward a good idea for our group project yesterday.
example1_ru: Вчера я выдвинул хорошую идею для нашего группового проекта.
example2: She put forward her opinion during the class discussion.

en_definition: to search for information in a book, dictionary, or on the internet
example1: If you don't know a word, look it up in the dictionary.
example1_ru: Если не знаешь слово, посмотри его в словаре.
example2: I looked up the definition of that difficult English word.

en_definition: to do work you have missed or to reach the same level as others
example1: After being sick, I had to catch up on my assignments.
example1_ru: После болезни мне пришлось наверстать задания.
example2: I need to catch up on reading for the exam next week.

en_definition: to stay at the same level as others or maintain a pace
example1: It is hard to keep up with all the homework at university.
example1_ru: В университете трудно успевать за всей домашней работой.
example2: She works very hard to keep up with her classmates.

en_definition: to spend time doing something or trying to improve something
example1: I'm working on my English pronunciation with the language teacher.
example1_ru: Я работаю над своим произношением вместе с преподавателем языка.
example2: The team is working on the project for the next two weeks.

en_definition: to give something to someone, usually homework or an assignment
example1: Please hand in your assignments before the Friday deadline.
example1_ru: Пожалуйста, сдайте задания до крайнего срока в пятницу.
example2: I handed in my essay to the professor yesterday morning.

en_definition: to look carefully at something to find mistakes or make sure it is correct
example1: Always check over your work before you submit it to the teacher.
example1_ru: Всегда проверяйте свою работу перед тем, как сдать её учителю.
example2: I checked over the essay and found several spelling mistakes.

en_definition: all the words that a person knows and can use in a language
example1: Learning vocabulary every day helps improve your English quickly.
example1_ru: Ежедневное изучение словарного запаса быстро улучшает ваш английский.
example2: My vocabulary in English is still limited after one year.

en_definition: the rules for how words are arranged in a language
example1: English grammar is difficult for Russian speakers to learn.
example1_ru: Русскоговорящим трудно даётся английская грамматика.
example2: We study grammar rules in detail during the intensive course.

en_definition: the way that a word is spoken or sounds when you say it
example1: The teacher corrected my pronunciation during the class.
example1_ru: Учитель исправил моё произношение на занятии.
example2: Good pronunciation helps people understand you better.

en_definition: the way someone pronounces words because of where they come from
example1: I still have a Russian accent when I speak English.
example1_ru: У меня всё ещё есть русский акцент, когда я говорю по-английски.
example2: Her English accent has become much softer after living here.

en_definition: able to speak smoothly and easily without pausing or hesitating
example1: I hope to be fluent in English after studying at university.
example1_ru: Я надеюсь свободно говорить по-английски после учёбы в университете.
example2: She is fluent in English, French, and Russian languages.

en_definition: the quality of being able to speak smoothly and easily
example1: My fluency in English has improved significantly this year.
example1_ru: В этом году моя беглость в английском заметно улучшилась.
example2: Teachers evaluate both accuracy and fluency in speaking tests.

ru_translation: носитель языка, говорящий на родном языке
en_definition: a person for whom a language is their first and main language
example1: Native speakers find some English words difficult to explain.
example1_ru: Носителям языка бывает трудно объяснить некоторые английские слова.
example2: Practice with native speakers to improve your English quickly.

en_definition: something that is wrong or done incorrectly by accident
example1: I made a mistake on my exam and lost five points.
example1_ru: Я допустил ошибку на экзамене и потерял пять баллов.
example2: Everyone makes mistakes when learning a new language.

en_definition: comments about something you did, saying what was good or bad
example1: The teacher gave me helpful feedback on my essay last week.
example1_ru: На прошлой неделе учитель дал мне полезные комментарии к сочинению.
example2: I appreciated the feedback about my presentation from my classmates.

en_definition: to become better or to make something become better
example1: Your English will improve with daily practice and study.
example1_ru: Ваш английский улучшится благодаря ежедневной практике и учёбе.
example2: I want to improve my writing skills before graduation.

en_definition: improvement or movement toward a goal or better situation
example1: I have made good progress in my English studies this year.
example1_ru: В этом году я добился хорошего прогресса в изучении английского.
example2: The teacher said my progress in grammar is very good.

en_definition: something difficult that tests your abilities or skills
example1: The biggest challenge for me is understanding the teacher's accent.
example1_ru: Самая большая трудность для меня — понимать акцент учителя.
example2: Speaking fluently is a real challenge for all language learners.

en_definition: hard to do or understand because you need a lot of skill or effort
example1: The exam was very difficult and I struggled with many questions.
example1_ru: Экзамен был очень сложным, и я с трудом справлялся со многими вопросами.
example2: Mathematics is more difficult than other subjects for most students.

en_definition: not hard to do or understand and needs little effort
example1: The exam questions were very easy for someone with good English.
example1_ru: Вопросы экзамена были очень лёгкими для того, у кого хороший английский.
example2: This assignment is easier than the one last month.

en_definition: having many parts or elements and difficult to understand
example1: The professor explained the complex theory in a simple way.
example1_ru: Профессор объяснил сложную теорию простым языком.
example2: English grammar has many complex rules to remember.

en_definition: easy to see, understand, or hear; not confusing
example1: The teacher gave clear instructions for the homework assignment.
example1_ru: Учитель дал чёткие инструкции по домашнему заданию.
example2: His explanation was very clear and everyone understood.

en_definition: difficult to understand because it is complicated or unclear
example1: The confusing grammar rule took me a long time to understand.
example1_ru: На понимание этого запутанного грамматического правила у меня ушло много времени.
example2: The instructions were confusing, so I asked for clarification.

en_definition: not interesting or exciting and dull to experience
example1: That lecture was so boring I almost fell asleep in class.
example1_ru: Эта лекция была такой скучной, что я чуть не заснул на занятии.
example2: Learning vocabulary can be boring sometimes, so mix it up.

en_definition: catching your attention and holding your interest very well
example1: The discussion about global business was very interesting.
example1_ru: Обсуждение глобального бизнеса было очень интересным.
example2: I find English literature interesting even though it is difficult.

en_definition: helpful or beneficial because it can be used for a purpose
example1: The teacher gave us useful tips for improving our writing.
example1_ru: Учитель дал нам полезные советы по улучшению письма.
example2: This course is very useful for my future career.

en_definition: to arrange or plan things in a way that is neat and effective
example1: I organize my study schedule to make time for all subjects.
example1_ru: Я организую своё расписание учёбы так, чтобы хватало времени на все предметы.
example2: She organized the group project meeting very well.

en_definition: to be in charge of something or to handle a situation successfully
example1: I manage my time carefully to complete all assignments.
example1_ru: Я тщательно распределяю время, чтобы выполнить все задания.
example2: The team manager handles all decisions for our group.

en_definition: having a duty to do something and being able to be trusted
example1: As a student, I am responsible for completing my assignments.
example1_ru: Как студент, я отвечаю за выполнение своих заданий.
example2: Good employees are responsible and reliable in their work.

en_definition: to work together with other people to achieve a goal
example1: We cooperate with our colleagues to finish the project.
example1_ru: Мы сотрудничаем с коллегами, чтобы закончить проект.
example2: Students must cooperate in group work for the assignment.

en_definition: to work together with a person or organization on a project
example1: We cooperate with other departments to solve business problems.
example1_ru: Мы взаимодействуем с другими отделами, чтобы решать бизнес-задачи.
example2: I cooperate with my classmate to complete the group project.

en_definition: to give or add something, especially to a shared effort
example1: Everyone contributes ideas to the group discussion.
example1_ru: Каждый вносит свои идеи в групповое обсуждение.
example2: All team members contribute to the success of the project.

en_definition: to help someone or something or to say you agree with it
example1: My friends support me when I struggle with my studies.
example1_ru: Друзья поддерживают меня, когда мне трудно даётся учёба.
example2: The professor supports students who have learning difficulties.

en_definition: to make someone feel more confident or willing to do something
example1: My teacher encourages me to speak more in class.
example1_ru: Мой учитель поощряет меня больше говорить на занятиях.
example2: Good professors encourage students to ask questions.

en_definition: to give someone a reason or desire to do something
example1: Seeing my progress motivates me to keep studying English.
example1_ru: Наблюдение за своим прогрессом мотивирует меня продолжать учить английский.
example2: The teacher tries to motivate students to work harder.

en_definition: to direct all your attention and effort toward something
example1: I need to focus on my studies before the final exam.
example1_ru: Мне нужно сосредоточиться на учёбе перед итоговым экзаменом.
example2: The meeting focused on our company's business strategy.

en_definition: to focus all your attention on something, making an effort
example1: I need to concentrate on this difficult problem in math.
example1_ru: Мне нужно сконцентрироваться на этой сложной задаче по математике.
example2: It is hard to concentrate in a noisy classroom.

en_definition: to successfully complete or reach a goal or objective
example1: I hope to achieve my goal of speaking English fluently.
example1_ru: Я надеюсь достичь своей цели — свободно говорить по-английски.
example2: With hard work, she achieved excellent grades this semester.

en_definition: to achieve your goal or to accomplish something successfully
example1: With practice, you will succeed in learning English well.
example1_ru: С практикой у тебя получится хорошо выучить английский.
example2: She succeeded in completing the project before the deadline.

en_definition: a lack of success in doing or achieving something
example1: Failure on the exam was very difficult for me to accept.
example1_ru: Провал на экзамене было очень трудно принять.
example2: We learned from our failure and improved our approach.

en_definition: to achieve something you have been trying to do
example1: I succeeded in passing all my courses this semester.
example1_ru: Мне удалось сдать все предметы в этом семестре.
example2: She finally succeeded in getting a good score on the exam.

en_definition: to fail to go to an event or meeting that you should attend
example1: I missed class yesterday because I was sick with a cold.
example1_ru: Вчера я пропустил занятие, потому что простудился.
example2: Try not to miss any lectures as they contain important information.

en_definition: to stop studying at a school or university before finishing
example1: He decided to drop out of university after two semesters.
example1_ru: Он решил бросить университет после двух семестров.
example2: Many students drop out due to financial difficulties.

en_definition: to successfully finish your studies at school or university
example1: I plan to graduate next year with a degree in business.
example1_ru: В следующем году я планирую закончить университет со степенью в бизнесе.
example2: She graduated from university with excellent grades.

en_definition: a qualification you get after completing university studies
example1: I want to get a degree in Business Administration.
example1_ru: Я хочу получить степень бакалавра делового администрирования.
example2: My degree in English will help me find a teaching job.

en_definition: the teaching and learning of knowledge and skills, usually in schools
example1: A good education is important for finding a career.
example1_ru: Хорошее образование важно для построения карьеры.
example2: I want to continue my education at a university in China.
